prose.en: Providers MUST supply the results of FedRAMP independent assessments in their FedRAMP Certification Package without inappropriate modification.

en: Inappropriate modification in this context means changing the underlying intent/etc. of the content provided by the independent assessment service - the content itself may be modified for presentation, formatting, etc. as needed.
This rule is related to IVV-IAS-VIP (Verify Inclusion in Certification Package).
